---
title: Etoile
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1780061139/etoile_bwhrec.png
description: Série Etoile 2025, de Amy Sherman Palladino
categories: [fanart]
date: 2026-05-29
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1780061139/etoile_bwhrec.png)

::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
